<file name="f:\AUDIRA-KOMIK-MDA\apps\gateway\src\middleware\validation.ts" language="typescript" >
<content>
/**
 * Validation Middleware
 * Validates request body, query, and params using Zod schemas
 */

import { FastifyRequest, FastifyReply } from 'fastify';
import { ZodSchema, ZodError } from 'zod';
import { logger } from '../services/loggerService';
import { createAppError } from './errorHandler';
import { ErrorCode } from '../constants/errorCodes';

/**
 * Sanitize input to remove dangerous characters
 */
export function sanitizeInput(data: any): any {
  if (typeof data === 'string') {
    // Remove potentially dangerous characters
    return data
      .replace(/[<>]/g, '') // Remove angle brackets
      .trim();
  }

  if (Array.isArray(data)) {
    return data.map(item => sanitizeInput(item));
  }

  if (typeof data === 'object' && data !== null) {
    const sanitized: Record<string, any> = {};
    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(data)) {
      sanitized[key] = sanitizeInput(value);
    }
    return sanitized;
  }

  return data;
}

/**
 * Format Zod validation errors
 */
function formatValidationErrors(error: ZodError): Record<string, string> {
  const formatted: Record<string, string> = {};

  error.errors.forEach(err => {
    const path = err.path.join('.');
    formatted[path] = err.message;
  });

  return formatted;
}

/**
 * Validate request body
 */
export function validateBody(schema: ZodSchema) {
  return async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
    try {
      const validated = schema.parse(request.body);
      request.body = sanitizeInput(validated);
    } catch (error) {
      if (error instanceof ZodError) {
        const errors = formatValidationErrors(error);
        logger.warn('Request body validation failed', {
          requestId: request.id,
          path: request.url,
          errors,
        });

        throw createAppError(
          'Validasi request body gagal',
          ErrorCode.VALIDATION_ERROR,
          400,
          { errors }
        );
      }
      throw error;
    }
  };
}

/**
 * Validate query parameters
 */
export function validateQuery(schema: ZodSchema) {
  return async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
    try {
      const validated = schema.parse(request.query);
      request.query = sanitizeInput(validated);
    } catch (error) {
      if (error instanceof ZodError) {
        const errors = formatValidationErrors(error);
        logger.warn('Query validation failed', {
          requestId: request.id,
          path: request.url,
          errors,
        });

        throw createAppError(
          'Validasi query parameter gagal',
          ErrorCode.VALIDATION_ERROR,
          400,
          { errors }
        );
      }
      throw error;
    }
  };
}

/**
 * Validate URL parameters
 */
export function validateParams(schema: ZodSchema) {
  return async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
    try {
      const validated = schema.parse(request.params);
      request.params = sanitizeInput(validated);
    } catch (error) {
      if (error instanceof ZodError) {
        const errors = formatValidationErrors(error);
        logger.warn('Params validation failed', {
          requestId: request.id,
          path: request.url,
          errors,
        });

        throw createAppError(
          'Validasi URL parameter gagal',
          ErrorCode.VALIDATION_ERROR,
          400,
          { errors }
        );
      }
      throw error;
    }
  };
}

/**
 * Validate content type
 */
export function validateContentType(allowedTypes: string[]) {
  return async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
    const contentType = request.headers['content-type'];

    if (!contentType) {
      throw createAppError(
        'Content-Type header diperlukan',
        ErrorCode.BAD_REQUEST,
        400
      );
    }

    const baseContentType = contentType.split(';')[0].trim();

    if (!allowedTypes.includes(baseContentType)) {
      throw createAppError(
        `Content-Type harus salah satu dari: ${allowedTypes.join(', ')}`,
        ErrorCode.BAD_REQUEST,
        400
      );
    }
  };
}

/**
 * Validate request size
 */
export function validateRequestSize(maxSizeBytes: number = 10 * 1024 * 1024) {
  return async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
    const contentLength = parseInt(request.headers['content-length'] || '0');

    if (contentLength > maxSizeBytes) {
      throw createAppError(
        `Request size terlalu besar (maksimal ${maxSizeBytes / 1024 / 1024}MB)`,
        ErrorCode.BAD_REQUEST,
        413
      );
    }
  };
}

/**
 * Composite validation middleware
 */
export function validate(options: {
  body?: ZodSchema;
  query?: ZodSchema;
  params?: ZodSchema;
  contentType?: string[];
  maxSize?: number;
}) {
  return async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
    // Validate content type if specified
    if (options.contentType) {
      await validateContentType(options.contentType)(request, reply);
    }

    // Validate request size if specified
    if (options.maxSize) {
      await validateRequestSize(options.maxSize)(request, reply);
    }

    // Validate body if schema provided
    if (options.body) {
      await validateBody(options.body)(request, reply);
    }

    // Validate query if schema provided
    if (options.query) {
      await validateQuery(options.query)(request, reply);
    }

    // Validate params if schema provided
    if (options.params) {
      await validateParams(options.params)(request, reply);
    }
  };
}

/**
 * Helper function to create validation middleware for routes
 */
export function createValidationMiddleware(options: {
  body?: ZodSchema;
  query?: ZodSchema;
  params?: ZodSchema;
}) {
  return validate(options);
}

/**
 * Batch validation for multiple fields
 */
export async function validateMultiple(
  data: Record<string, any>,
  schemas: Record<string, ZodSchema>
): Promise<{ valid: boolean; errors?: Record<string, string> }> {
  const errors: Record<string, string> = {};

  for (const [field, schema] of Object.entries(schemas)) {
    try {
      schema.parse(data[field]);
    } catch (error) {
      if (error instanceof ZodError) {
        const fieldErrors = formatValidationErrors(error);
        errors[field] = Object.values(fieldErrors).join(', ');
      }
    }
  }

  return {
    valid: Object.keys(errors).length === 0,
    errors: Object.keys(errors).length > 0 ? errors : undefined,
  };
}

/**
 * Validate and transform data
 */
export async function validateAndTransform<T>(
  data: any,
  schema: ZodSchema
): Promise<T> {
  try {
    return schema.parse(data) as T;
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof ZodError) {
      const errors = formatValidationErrors(error);
      throw createAppError(
        'Validasi data gagal',
        ErrorCode.VALIDATION_ERROR,
        400,
        { errors }
      );
    }
    throw error;
  }
}

/**
 * Safe validation (returns result instead of throwing)
 */
export async function safeValidate<T>(
  data: any,
  schema: ZodSchema
): Promise<{ success: boolean; data?: T; errors?: Record<string, string> }> {
  try {
    const validated = schema.parse(data);
    return { success: true, data: validated as T };
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof ZodError) {
      const errors = formatValidationErrors(error);
      return { success: false, errors };
    }
    return { success: false, errors: { _error: 'Unknown validation error' } };
  }
}

</content>
</file>

content.text:
<file name="f:\AUDIRA-KOMIK-MDA\apps\gateway\src\index.ts" language="typescript" >
<content>
import Fastify from 'fastify';
import cors from '@fastify/cors';
import jwt from '@fastify/jwt';
import rateLimit from '@fastify/rate-limit';
import multipart from '@fastify/multipart';
import fastifyStatic from '@fastify/static';
import { Server } from 'socket.io';
import dotenv from 'dotenv';
import path from 'path';
import fs from 'fs';
import { scraperService } from './services/scraper';
import { authService } from './services/auth';
import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client';
import { scraperQueue, initScraperWorker } from './services/scraperQueue';
import { setSocketInstance } from './services/socketManager';
import { initLiveCommentsHandler } from './services/liveCommentsHandler';
import { initPresenceHandler } from './services/presenceHandler';
import { initNotificationHandler } from './services/notificationHandler';
import { contentRoutes } from './routes/content';
import { userRoutes } from './routes/users';
import { taxonomyRoutes } from './routes/taxonomy';
import { adminRoutes } from './routes/admin';
import { uploadRoutes } from './routes/upload';
import { engagementRoutes } from './routes/engagement';
import { passwordResetRoutes } from './routes/passwordReset';
import { scrapeApiRoutes } from './routes/scrapeApi';
import { permissionRoutes } from './routes/permissions';
import { analyticsRoutes } from './routes/analytics';
import { registerScraperManagementRoutes } from './routes/scraperManagement';
import { logActivity } from './middleware/activityLogger';
import { trackPageViewMiddleware } from './middleware/analyticsMiddleware';
import { loginSchema, registerSchema } from './schemas/validation';
import { logger, LogLevel } from './services/loggerService';
import { errorHandler } from './middleware/errorHandler';
import { compositeRequestLoggerMiddleware } from './middleware/requestLogger';

dotenv.config();

const prisma = new PrismaClient();
const fastify = Fastify({
  logger: false, // Disable default logger, use our custom logger
});

// Initialize logger
const logLevel = (process.env.LOG_LEVEL as LogLevel) || LogLevel.INFO;
logger.setLogLevel(logLevel);
logger.info('Logger initialized', { logLevel, environment: process.env.NODE_ENV });

// Plugins
fastify.register(cors, {
  origin: process.env.CORS_ORIGIN || '*',
});

fastify.register(jwt, {
  secret: process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'supersecret',
});

// Rate Limiting
fastify.register(rateLimit, {
  max: 100,
  timeWindow: '1 minute',
});

// Multipart (file upload)
fastify.register(multipart, {
  limits: { fileSize: 5 * 1024 * 1024 } // 5MB
});

// Static file serving (uploads)
const uploadsDir = path.join(process.cwd(), 'uploads');
if (!fs.existsSync(uploadsDir)) {
  fs.mkdirSync(uploadsDir, { recursive: true });
}
fastify.register(fastifyStatic, {
  root: uploadsDir,
  prefix: '/uploads/',
  decorateReply: false,
});

// Request logging middleware - must be first
fastify.addHook('onRequest', compositeRequestLoggerMiddleware);

// Analytics middleware - track all page views
fastify.addHook('onRequest', trackPageViewMiddleware);

// Error handler hook - must be last
fastify.setErrorHandler(errorHandler);

// Basic Route
fastify.get('/health', async () => {
  return { status: 'ok', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() };
});

// --- AUTH ROUTES ---

// Register
fastify.post('/api/auth/register', async (request, reply) => {
  const parsed = registerSchema.safeParse(request.body);
  if (!parsed.success) {
    return reply.status(400).send({ success: false, message: parsed.error.errors[0].message });
  }

  const { username, email, password } = parsed.data;

  try {
    const user = await authService.register({ username, email, password });
    const token = fastify.jwt.sign({ id: user.id, role: user.role }, { expiresIn: '7d' });
    return { success: true, data: { user, token } };
  } catch (error: any) {
    const status = error.statusCode || 500;
    return reply.status(status).send({ success: false, message: error.message || 'Gagal mendaftar' });
  }
});

// Login (stricter rate limit)
fastify.post('/api/auth/login', { config: { rateLimit: { max: 10, timeWindow: '1 minute' } } }, async (request, reply) => {
  const parsed = loginSchema.safeParse(request.body);
  if (!parsed.success) {
    return reply.status(400).send({ success: false, message: parsed.error.errors[0].message });
  }

  const { email, password } = parsed.data;

  try {
    const user = await authService.login(email, password);
    const token = fastify.jwt.sign({ id: user.id, role: user.role }, { expiresIn: '7d' });
    await logActivity(request, 'AUTH', 'LOGIN', `User ${user.username} berhasil login`);
    return { success: true, data: { user, token } };
  } catch (error: any) {
    const status = error.statusCode || 500;
    return reply.status(status).send({ success: false, message: error.message || 'Gagal login' });
  }
});

// Get current user profile (protected)
fastify.get('/api/auth/me', async (request, reply) => {
  try {
    await request.jwtVerify();
    const { id } = request.user as { id: string };
    const user = await authService.getProfile(id);
    return { success: true, data: user };
  } catch (error: any) {
    return reply.status(401).send({ success: false, message: 'Token tidak valid atau sudah expired' });
  }
});

// Scraper Route
fastify.get('/api/trending', async (request, reply) => {
  const trending = await scraperService.scrapeTrending();
  return { success: true, data: trending };
});

// Content Routes (Anime, Manga, Donghua) with pagination
fastify.get('/api/content', async (request, reply) => {
  const { type, status, limit, skip, q, page, pageSize } = request.query as any;
  
  const take = limit ? parseInt(limit) : (pageSize ? parseInt(pageSize) : 20);
  const skipCount = skip ? parseInt(skip) : (page ? (parseInt(page) - 1) * take : 0);

  const where = {
    ...(type && { type }),
    ...(status && { status }),
    ...(q && {
      title: {
        contains: q,
        mode: 'insensitive' as const
      }
    }),
  };

  const [contents, total] = await Promise.all([
    prisma.content.findMany({
      where,
      take,
      skip: skipCount,
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      include: { genres: true }
    }),
    prisma.content.count({ where })
  ]);

  return { 
    success: true, 
    data: contents, 
    meta: { total, page: Math.floor(skipCount / take) + 1, pageSize: take, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / take) }
  };
});

// News Routes
fastify.get('/api/news', async (request, reply) => {
  const news = await prisma.news.findMany({
    orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
    take: 10
  });
  return { success: true, data: news };
});

// Banner Routes
fastify.get('/api/banners', async (request, reply) => {
  const banners = await prisma.banner.findMany({
    where: { isActive: true },
    orderBy: { order: 'asc' }
  });
  return { success: true, data: banners };
});

// Create News (Admin)
fastify.post('/api/news', async (request, reply) => {
  const data = request.body as any;
  const news = await prisma.news.create({ data });
  return { success: true, data: news };
});

// Genre Route
fastify.get('/api/genres', async (request, reply) => {
  const genres = await prisma.genre.findMany({
    orderBy: { name: 'asc' }
  });
  return { success: true, data: genres };
});

// --- REGISTER ROUTE MODULES ---
fastify.register(contentRoutes);
fastify.register(userRoutes);
fastify.register(taxonomyRoutes);
fastify.register(adminRoutes);
fastify.register(uploadRoutes);
fastify.register(engagementRoutes);
fastify.register(passwordResetRoutes);
fastify.register(scrapeApiRoutes);
fastify.register(permissionRoutes);
fastify.register(analyticsRoutes);
fastify.register(registerScraperManagementRoutes);

// --- SCRAPER MANAGEMENT ROUTES ---

// Get all sources
fastify.get('/api/scrapers', async (request, reply) => {
  const sources = await scraperService.getSources();
  return { success: true, data: sources };
});

// Create new source
fastify.post('/api/scrapers', async (request, reply) => {
  const data = request.body as any;
  const source = await scraperService.createSource(data);
  return { success: true, data: source };
});

// Run scraper (Queue)
fastify.post('/api/scrapers/:id/run', async (request, reply) => {
  const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
  try {
    // Add job to queue
    const job = await scraperQueue.add('scrape', { sourceId: id });
    return { success: true, message: 'Scraping job queued', jobId: job.id };
  } catch (error: any) {
    return reply.status(500).send({ success: false, error: error.message });
  }
});

// Get logs (Updated for new schema)
fastify.get('/api/scrapers/logs', async (request, reply) => {
  const logs = await prisma.scraperLog.findMany({
    include: { source: { select: { name: true, type: true } } },
    orderBy: { startedAt: 'desc' },
    take: 50
  });
  return { success: true, data: logs };
});

// Get Dashboard Stats
fastify.get('/api/scrapers/stats', async (request, reply) => {
  const today = new Date();
  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);

  const [totalSources, activeScrapers, todayLogs] = await Promise.all([
    prisma.scraperSource.count(),
    prisma.scraperLog.count({ where: { status: 'BERJALAN' } }),
    prisma.scraperLog.findMany({ where: { startedAt: { gte: today } } })
  ]);

  let itemsAdded = 0;
  let itemsFailed = 0;
  const running = activeScrapers;
  let successRuns = 0;
  let failedRuns = 0;

  todayLogs.forEach((log: any) => {
    itemsAdded += log.itemsAdded;
    itemsFailed += log.itemsFailed;
    if (log.status === 'SELESAI') successRuns++;
    if (log.status === 'ERROR') failedRuns++;
  });

  return { 
    success: true, 
    data: {
      totalSources,
      activeScrapers,
      todayStats: {
        itemsAdded,
        itemsFailed,
        running,
        successRuns,
        failedRuns,
        totalRuns: todayLogs.length
      }
    } 
  };
});

// Start Server
const start = async () => {
  try {
    const port = parseInt(process.env.PORT || '4000');
    await fastify.listen({ port, host: '0.0.0.0' });
    
    logger.info('Server started successfully', {
      port,
      host: '0.0.0.0',
      environment: process.env.NODE_ENV,
      nodeVersion: process.version,
    });

    // Socket.io setup
    const io = new Server(fastify.server, {
      cors: {
        origin: '*',
      },
    });

    setSocketInstance(io);

    io.on('connection', (socket) => {
      logger.debug('Client connected', {
        socketId: socket.id,
        clientIp: socket.handshake.address,
      });
      
      // Register real-time handlers
      initLiveCommentsHandler(socket, io, prisma);
      initPresenceHandler(io);
      initNotificationHandler(socket, io, prisma);
      
      socket.on('disconnect', () => {
        logger.debug('Client disconnected', {
          socketId: socket.id,
        });
      });

      socket.on('error', (error) => {
        logger.error('Socket error', error, {
          socketId: socket.id,
        });
      });
    });

    // Initialize BullMQ Worker with Socket.io
    initScraperWorker(io);

    logger.info(`Gateway running at http://localhost:${port}`);
  } catch (err) {
    logger.fatal('Failed to start server', err instanceof Error ? err : new Error(String(err)), {
      port: process.env.PORT || '4000',
    });
    process.exit(1);
  }
};

// Handle uncaught exceptions
process.on('uncaughtException', (error) => {
  logger.fatal('Uncaught exception', error);
  process.exit(1);
});

// Handle unhandled promise rejections
process.on('unhandledRejection', (reason, promise) => {
  logger.fatal('Unhandled rejection', new Error(String(reason)), {
    promise: String(promise),
  });
  process.exit(1);
});

// Graceful shutdown
process.on('SIGTERM', async () => {
  logger.info('SIGTERM received, shutting down gracefully');
  await fastify.close();
  await logger.close();
  process.exit(0);
});

process.on('SIGINT', async () => {
  logger.info('SIGINT received, shutting down gracefully');
  await fastify.close();
  await logger.close();
  process.exit(0);
});

start();

</content>
</file>

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-KOMIK-MDA\apps\gateway\src\middleware\rateLimiting.ts" language="typescript" >
<content>
/**
 * Rate Limiting Middleware
 * Implements rate limiting per endpoint, user, and IP address
 */

import { FastifyRequest, FastifyReply } from 'fastify';
import { logger } from '../services/loggerService';
import { createAppError } from './errorHandler';
import { ErrorCode } from '../constants/errorCodes';

/**
 * Rate limit store interface
 */
interface RateLimitEntry {
  count: number;
  resetTime: number;
}

/**
 * Rate limiter configuration
 */
export interface RateLimiterConfig {
  limit: number; // Maximum requests
  window: number; // Time window in seconds
  keyGenerator?: (request: FastifyRequest) => string; // Custom key generator
  skipSuccessfulRequests?: boolean; // Skip counting successful requests
  skipFailedRequests?: boolean; // Skip counting failed requests
}

/**
 * In-memory rate limit store
 */
class RateLimitStore {
  private store: Map<string, RateLimitEntry> = new Map();
  private cleanupInterval: NodeJS.Timeout;

  constructor() {
    // Cleanup expired entries every minute
    this.cleanupInterval = setInterval(() => {
      this.cleanup();
    }, 60000);
  }

  /**
   * Get current count for key
   */
  get(key: string): RateLimitEntry | undefined {
    const entry = this.store.get(key);

    if (!entry) {
      return undefined;
    }

    // Check if entry has expired
    if (Date.now() > entry.resetTime) {
      this.store.delete(key);
      return undefined;
    }

    return entry;
  }

  /**
   * Increment count for key
   */
  increment(key: string, window: number): RateLimitEntry {
    const now = Date.now();
    const entry = this.store.get(key);

    if (!entry || now > entry.resetTime) {
      // Create new entry
      const newEntry: RateLimitEntry = {
        count: 1,
        resetTime: now + window * 1000,
      };
      this.store.set(key, newEntry);
      return newEntry;
    }

    // Increment existing entry
    entry.count++;
    return entry;
  }

  /**
   * Reset count for key
   */
  reset(key: string): void {
    this.store.delete(key);
  }

  /**
   * Cleanup expired entries
   */
  private cleanup(): void {
    const now = Date.now();
    const keysToDelete: string[] = [];

    for (const [key, entry] of this.store.entries()) {
      if (now > entry.resetTime) {
        keysToDelete.push(key);
      }
    }

    keysToDelete.forEach(key => this.store.delete(key));

    if (keysToDelete.length > 0) {
      logger.debug(`Rate limit cleanup: removed ${keysToDelete.length} expired entries`);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Destroy store and cleanup
   */
  destroy(): void {
    clearInterval(this.cleanupInterval);
    this.store.clear();
  }
}

/**
 * Global rate limit store
 */
const globalStore = new RateLimitStore();

/**
 * Create rate limiter middleware
 */
export function createRateLimiter(config: RateLimiterConfig) {
  return async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
    // Generate rate limit key
    const key = config.keyGenerator
      ? config.keyGenerator(request)
      : `${request.method}:${request.url}:${request.ip}`;

    // Get current entry
    const entry = globalStore.get(key);

    // Calculate remaining requests
    const remaining = Math.max(0, config.limit - (entry?.count || 0));
    const resetTime = entry?.resetTime || Date.now() + config.window * 1000;

    // Set rate limit headers
    reply.header('X-RateLimit-Limit', config.limit.toString());
    reply.header('X-RateLimit-Remaining', remaining.toString());
    reply.header('X-RateLimit-Reset', Math.ceil(resetTime / 1000).toString());

    // Check if limit exceeded
    if (entry && entry.count >= config.limit) {
      const retryAfter = Math.ceil((entry.resetTime - Date.now()) / 1000);
      reply.header('Retry-After', retryAfter.toString());

      logger.warn('Rate limit exceeded', {
        requestId: request.id,
        key,
        limit: config.limit,
        window: config.window,
        retryAfter,
      });

      throw createAppError(
        'Terlalu banyak request. Silakan coba lagi nanti.',
        ErrorCode.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED,
        429,
        { retryAfter }
      );
    }

    // Increment counter
    globalStore.increment(key, config.window);
  };
}

/**
 * Rate limit by endpoint
 */
export function rateLimitByEndpoint(limit: number, window: number) {
  return createRateLimiter({
    limit,
    window,
    keyGenerator: (request) => `endpoint:${request.method}:${request.url}`,
  });
}

/**
 * Rate limit by user
 */
export function rateLimitByUser(limit: number, window: number) {
  return createRateLimiter({
    limit,
    window,
    keyGenerator: (request) => {
      const userId = (request.user as any)?.id || 'anonymous';
      return `user:${userId}`;
    },
  });
}

/**
 * Rate limit by IP
 */
export function rateLimitByIP(limit: number, window: number) {
  return createRateLimiter({
    limit,
    window,
    keyGenerator: (request) => `ip:${request.ip}`,
  });
}

/**
 * Rate limit by user and IP (combined)
 */
export function rateLimitByUserAndIP(limit: number, window: number) {
  return createRateLimiter({
    limit,
    window,
    keyGenerator: (request) => {
      const userId = (request.user as any)?.id || 'anonymous';
      return `user-ip:${userId}:${request.ip}`;
    },
  });
}

/**
 * Sliding window rate limiter
 */
export function slidingWindowRateLimiter(limit: number, window: number) {
  return createRateLimiter({
    limit,
    window,
  });
}

/**
 * Burst rate limiter (allows burst but limits over time)
 */
export function burstRateLimiter(
  burstLimit: number,
  sustainedLimit: number,
  window: number
) {
  return async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
    const key = `burst:${request.method}:${request.url}:${request.ip}`;
    const entry = globalStore.get(key);

    // Check burst limit
    if (entry && entry.count >= burstLimit) {
      // Check if we're still in burst window
      const timeSinceReset = (entry.resetTime - Date.now()) / 1000;
      const expectedCount = Math.ceil((window - timeSinceReset) * (sustainedLimit / window));

      if (entry.count > expectedCount) {
        const retryAfter = Math.ceil((entry.resetTime - Date.now()) / 1000);
        reply.header('Retry-After', retryAfter.toString());

        throw createAppError(
          'Burst limit exceeded',
          ErrorCode.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED,
          429,
          { retryAfter }
        );
      }
    }

    globalStore.increment(key, window);
  };
}

/**
 * Predefined rate limit configurations
 */
export const rateLimitConfigs = {
  // Auth endpoints - very strict
  auth: {
    register: { limit: 5, window: 3600 }, // 5 per hour
    login: { limit: 10, window: 3600 }, // 10 per hour
    resetPassword: { limit: 3, window: 3600 }, // 3 per hour
  },

  // Admin endpoints - moderate
  admin: {
    default: { limit: 100, window: 3600 }, // 100 per hour
    backup: { limit: 10, window: 3600 }, // 10 per hour
    scraper: { limit: 20, window: 3600 }, // 20 per hour
    analytics: { limit: 50, window: 3600 }, // 50 per hour
  },

  // API endpoints - generous
  api: {
    default: { limit: 1000, window: 3600 }, // 1000 per hour
    search: { limit: 100, window: 60 }, // 100 per minute
    content: { limit: 500, window: 3600 }, // 500 per hour
  },

  // Public endpoints - very generous
  public: {
    default: { limit: 10000, window: 3600 }, // 10000 per hour
  },
};

/**
 * Apply rate limiting to route
 */
export function applyRateLimit(
  request: FastifyRequest,
  config: { limit: number; window: number }
) {
  return createRateLimiter(config);
}

/**
 * Get rate limit status for key
 */
export function getRateLimitStatus(key: string, limit: number) {
  const entry = globalStore.get(key);

  if (!entry) {
    return {
      count: 0,
      limit,
      remaining: limit,
      resetTime: Date.now() + 3600000,
      isLimited: false,
    };
  }

  return {
    count: entry.count,
    limit,
    remaining: Math.max(0, limit - entry.count),
    resetTime: entry.resetTime,
    isLimited: entry.count >= limit,
  };
}

/**
 * Reset rate limit for key
 */
export function resetRateLimit(key: string) {
  globalStore.reset(key);
}

/**
 * Cleanup rate limiter
 */
export function cleanupRateLimiter() {
  globalStore.destroy();
}

/**
 * Rate limit middleware factory
 */
export function createRateLimitMiddleware(
  limitConfig: Record<string, { limit: number; window: number }>
) {
  return async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
    // Determine which config to use based on route
    let config = limitConfig['default'];

    for (const [pattern, cfg] of Object.entries(limitConfig)) {
      if (pattern !== 'default' && request.url.includes(pattern)) {
        config = cfg;
        break;
      }
    }

    if (config) {
      await createRateLimiter({
        limit: config.limit,
        window: config.window,
        keyGenerator: (req) => `${req.method}:${req.url}:${req.ip}`,
      })(request, reply);
    }
  };
}

</content>
</file>

import { Server } from 'socket.io';

let ioInstance: Server | null = null;

export function setSocketInstance(io: Server) {
  ioInstance = io;
}

export function getSocketInstance(): Server | null {
  return ioInstance;
}

/**
 * Emit a notification to all connected clients
 */
export function emitNotification(event: string, data: any) {
  if (ioInstance) {
    ioInstance.emit(event, data);
  }
}

</content>
</file>

<content>
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';

// These tests validate the API route logic without needing a running server
// In a full setup, you'd use supertest with the Fastify instance

describe('API Validation Logic', () => {

  describe('Auth Validation', () => {
    it('should reject empty email', () => {
      const email = '';
      expect(email.length).toBe(0);
    });

    it('should reject short password', () => {
      const password = '123';
      expect(password.length).toBeLessThan(6);
    });

    it('should accept valid email format', () => {
      const email = 'test@audira.com';
      expect(email).toMatch(/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/);
    });

    it('should accept password >= 6 chars', () => {
      const password = 'password123';
      expect(password.length).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(6);
    });
  });

  describe('Content Validation', () => {
    it('should generate valid slug from title', () => {
      const title = 'One Piece: Egghead Arc';
      const slug = title.toLowerCase().replace(/ /g, '-').replace(/[^\w-]+/g, '');
      expect(slug).toBe('one-piece-egghead-arc');
    });

    it('should handle special characters in slug', () => {
      const title = 'Jujutsu Kaisen (2nd Season)';
      const slug = title.toLowerCase().replace(/ /g, '-').replace(/[^\w-]+/g, '');
      expect(slug).toBe('jujutsu-kaisen-2nd-season');
    });

    it('should validate content type enum', () => {
      const validTypes = ['ANIME', 'MANGA', 'DONGHUA'];
      expect(validTypes.includes('ANIME')).toBe(true);
      expect(validTypes.includes('MOVIE')).toBe(false);
    });

    it('should validate content status enum', () => {
      const validStatuses = ['ONGOING', 'COMPLETED', 'HIATUS', 'DROPPED'];
      expect(validStatuses.includes('ONGOING')).toBe(true);
      expect(validStatuses.includes('CANCELLED')).toBe(false);
    });
  });

  describe('Rating Validation', () => {
    it('should reject rating below 1', () => {
      const score = 0;
      expect(score >= 1 && score <= 10).toBe(false);
    });

    it('should reject rating above 10', () => {
      const score = 11;
      expect(score >= 1 && score <= 10).toBe(false);
    });

    it('should accept valid rating', () => {
      const score = 8.5;
      expect(score >= 1 && score <= 10).toBe(true);
    });
  });

  describe('Pagination Logic', () => {
    it('should calculate correct skip for page 1', () => {
      const page = 1;
      const pageSize = 20;
      const skip = (page - 1) * pageSize;
      expect(skip).toBe(0);
    });

    it('should calculate correct skip for page 3', () => {
      const page = 3;
      const pageSize = 20;
      const skip = (page - 1) * pageSize;
      expect(skip).toBe(40);
    });

    it('should calculate total pages correctly', () => {
      const total = 55;
      const pageSize = 20;
      const totalPages = Math.ceil(total / pageSize);
      expect(totalPages).toBe(3);
    });
  });

  describe('Episode Batch Validation', () => {
    it('should parse batch episode data correctly', () => {
      const line = 'Episode 1 | 1 | https://video.url';
      const parts = line.split('|').map(p => p.trim());
      expect(parts[0]).toBe('Episode 1');
      expect(parts[1]).toBe('1');
      expect(parts[2]).toBe('https://video.url');
    });

    it('should handle missing video URL', () => {
      const line = 'Episode 2 | 2';
      const parts = line.split('|').map(p => p.trim());
      expect(parts[0]).toBe('Episode 2');
      expect(parts[1]).toBe('2');
      expect(parts[2]).toBeUndefined();
    });
  });
});

</content>
</file>
